name: Tourism Holdings Rentals Limited
analysis: THL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.3250. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.3500, stop A$2.0097, target A$3.3709 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
